channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][剧场版] Anime News Network GKIDS Screens Adolescence Utena 动画 Film U.S. Theaters on June 21-22
item.description: Film for Revolutionary Girl Utena series debuted in 1999 ― GKIDS announced on Thursday that it has acquired the North American theatrical rights for Adolescence of Utena, the 1999 anime film for the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: GKIDS Screens Adolescence of Utena Anime Film in U.S. Theaters on June 21-22

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Kindergarten Wars 动画 Casts Tetsu Inada
